stores.about_html:
ABOUT Alchemycode

Story: An Apothecary of Hope

Jaime Cross, visionary founder, wife, boy mom to five, herbal tea lover, and unapologetic bathing enthusiast, stands at the heart of The Alchemy Code. Raised on a farm, Jaime’s early connection to the earth sparked a lifelong passion for its transformative power. Now, alongside her husband Nathan, she has returned to her roots with their own regenerative farm—a place where renewal and vitality are woven into their everyday life. Fortified by their own transformation and the healing of loved ones, they are on a mission to help families reclaim wellness and take control of their destiny through holistic living.

The Alchemy Code began with a divine dream, where Jaime saw herself pouring oils and flowers, a vision that served as a blueprint for remedies designed to heal. From a humble kitchen apothecary, this vision has grown into a movement touching over one million lives. Each product is a fusion of ancient wisdom and intentional design, crafted to bring joy to self-care and the power of healing.

As parents and visionaries, Jaime and Nathan believe embracing functional wellbeing is the key to unlocking health, purpose, and generational impact. Through The Alchemy Code, they invite you to uncover your unique code and step boldly into the extraordinary life you were created to live.

 

Seed to Soul

There is a promise held within every seed, a profound potential waiting to unfold. Our heirloom seeds are planted in healthy soil and grow into flourishing plants, which then undergo a process of alchemy to become our Remedies. Through practices that replenish and renew the land, we honor the integrity of the whole plant—alive, robust, and always greater than the sum of its parts. The profound connection between soil and skin forms the foundation of a restorative approach to effortless beauty.

Apiary Alchemy

The hive is a sacred place of cultivation where bees transform nectar into raw honey and beeswax, each brimming with beneficial nourishment. It takes thousands of bees working together to create just one ounce of beeswax, a testament to their precision, dedication, and the power of community. Together, this liquid gold renews, protects, and preserves the youthful resilience of your skin, delivering deep hydration, a fortified barrier, and a radiant glow that only nature can provide.

Herbal Alchemy

From fertile farms, untamed forests, and sunlit fields, we sustainably wildcraft herbs and flowers while partnering with growers who honor and cultivate the land. Protecting the integrity of its living ecosystem as a way of life, we are passionate preservationists of tradition. Free from chemicals, synthetic fragrances, and fillers, our alchemy transforms the best of nature into extraordinary remedies for body and soul.

Clean + Living

We go beyond clean—our ingredients are alive. Every formula is infused with living nutrients, vibrant with the vitality of the earth, ensuring your skin receives nourishment in its most potent and unadulterated form.

Waterless

In place of fillers, we prioritize what matters most—highly concentrated, nutrient-dense ingredients that deliver uncompromising truth to your body. Waterless means more than purity; it means flourishing, sustainability, and appreciation for the earth.

 Ingredients Power the Remedy

Not all ingredients are created equal. Many products on the market rely on shortcuts—synthetic chemicals, industrial processing, and less pure formulations that compromise both results and wellness. At Alchemy Code, we are wildly passionate about high standards. Our Hierarchy of Ingredients ensures every creation is crafted with only the purest, most potent elements on earth. We exclusively source Grade 5 Organic, Grade 6 Wild, and the rare, extraordinary power of Grade 7 Wild Arctic ingredients. These unparalleled choices amplify your wellness and transformation for body, beauty, and soul.

Clean + Living

We use whole plant and living ingredients free from toxins. No compromise.

Handcrafted in the USA

Made, packed, and shipped in our own little Tennessee Apothecary

Sustainable Sourcing

We believe in faithful stewardship, from wildcrafted botanicals to small family farms and ethically harvested ingredients.

Happiness Guaranteed

Your satisfaction is our priority. We'll gladly provide a full refund if you're not completely delighted.

stores.about_html:
AlsoAsked: The Ultimate Search Intent Blueprint for Domination in 2026

Are you tired of producing high-quality content that still fails to rank? The problem isn't your writing—it’s that you aren't answering the questions your audience is actually asking. In an era where Google prioritizes "Helpful Content" above all else, AlsoAsked is the world’s leading tool for uncovering the "People Also Ask" (PAA) data that defines search intent.

https://www.google.com/search?q=AlsoAsked.com isn't just a keyword tool; it’s a strategic map of the human mind. It allows you to see the natural progression of user inquiries, giving you the power to build content silos and topical authority that search engines simply cannot ignore.

The AlsoAsked Power-Suite: Why It’s the Secret Weapon of Top SEO Agencies

  • Live "People Also Ask" Mapping: Most tools use historical data. AlsoAsked scrapes Google in real-time to show you the exact hierarchy of questions appearing right now. You can see how one core topic branches out into dozens of specific, high-intent sub-questions.

  • Topical Authority in One Click: Want to become the #1 resource in your niche? stores.about_html:
About Byza

How it started

This all started after my previous life fell apart during the COVID era. My business at the time went to zero, and like many people, I found myself in a dark place. Getting into fragrances was one of the few things that helped lift me out of that depression. Mixing, formulating, and experiencing both new and familiar scents in different ways helped me reconnect with myself and build new memories.

It wasn’t until friends and family started commenting and encouraging me to share my passion for perfumery that I seriously considered turning it into something more. That’s when I decided to start my own fragrance business, offering affordable perfumes with the kind of luxury experience typically found in expensive designer and niche brands. It took months of testing, refining, and fine-tuning blends before I was ready to release my first series of fragrances online.

I started this brand not just to challenge what luxury fragrance has become, but to stay deeply involved in something I love. This business is more than making affordable fragrances. It's about being hands-on with every step and sharing a craft I'm passionate about.

Performance Over Price

Many of the fragrances I offer are inspired by some of the world’s most iconic scents. They’re carefully developed using premium ingredients, sometimes with up to 90 percent of the same materials found in designer brands. My focus is not just on offering a better price, but on delivering better performance. Simply making something similar for less was never the goal. By removing the brand tax, I can make high-quality fragrance more accessible to people who appreciate scent the way I do.

Signature Series

My Signature Series are not dupes by any means. Although some may be inspired by key notes and scent combinations found in more popular perfumes, I try to carry out the essence of what I enjoy, drawn from areas in my life, into original blends inspired by nostalgia, emotion, mystery, and comfort.

My goal is to build upon future fragrance memories and heighten experiences through scent that are both personal and meaningful. Each one is designed to stand on its own and tell its own story.

Who am I?

This website officially launched in April 2025 and is primarily run by me. I’m the sole perfumer, the nose behind every scent, and the one responsible for all the visual design and artwork, with a little help from Canva for some of the labeling templates. I occasionally receive feedback and support from friends and family, but this is currently a one-man operation.

A Personal Thank You

This is something I truly love doing. And if you're someone who appreciates experience through scent and believes in accessible affordability, then I’m genuinely glad you're here.

I am sincerely grateful to every customer who chooses to support my work and be part of this journey.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart.

With gratitude,
Jeffrey Lee
Founder & Perfumer

stores.name: Chaosaudio
stores.about_html:
ABOUT Chaosaudio

Hi! We're Chaos Audio®, and we're a

Guitar Tech Company

My brother and I are passionate about helping guitarists have more fun. We believe that when products are designed to enable creativity, engineered to work well, and are an insane amount of fun, that’s when magic happens. We all know the search for tone is never over, so we build tech enabled gear that makes playing easier, more exciting, and more expressive. That way musicians can eliminate noise and focus on what they do best — creating.

Hi. I’m Landon McCoy, CEO of Chaos Audio®.


Several years ago, back in 2018, my younger brother, Chandler (Chief Operating Officer) and I loved noodling around on the guitar, but we didn’t know anything about guitar pedals. That was until my brother (who is a much better guitar player than me) decided to buy his first pedal: a Boss DS-1. I thought it was the coolest thing ever.

In 2019, I was majoring in electrical engineering. I immediately started researching how guitar pedals worked, so I could tinker around with making my own on a breadboard for fun. Chandler was the rock in determining whether or not an algorithm was exceptional enough to be used by other guitar players.

“Analog, single-effect pedals are cool, but how fun would it be to make a multi-effect pedal that could be entirely controlled from something as simple as a mobile app?” I got together with my brother and a few friends of mine, and for fun we started working on this project. Chaos Audio LLC was officially registered on August 31st, 2019.

After winning 1st Place and Dean’s Choice at a college entrepreneurship competition with our first prototype, we took the prize money, bought a 10 year old iMac for iOS development, and got to work. 

Shortly into our first year of operation, COVID struck. During lockdown, we basically lived out of the startup incubator we were operating out of. It was that month that we made the most progress on our electronics, and finally found the perfect hardware platform to use. We designed the first ever circuit board for Stratus, placed surface-mount components using tweezers for 5 hours, and frustratingly threw it into a toaster oven after it wouldn’t work the first time. Then, magically, our first design booted, and we could run code on it! What a cool experience.

In November 2020, we decided to launch our first Kickstarter campaign. We did a lot of things right, but not enough to see the success that we wanted to see. At $6k short of our goal, we decided to cancel the Kickstarter campaign and go back to the drawing board. Over the next 6 months, we continued to improve Stratus®, update the Chaos Audio® mobile app, and learn from others who launched successful Kickstarter campaigns.

In June 2021, our strategy worked. In just 30 days, over 545 backers helped us reach and well surpass our Kickstarter goal, raising over $130,000. Thanks to the support of our incredible backers, we learned that Stratus® had true potential in the music industry. The next step was to figure out manufacturing.

We were about a year late delivering to our backers, and we quickly learned just how difficult it is to mass produce an electronics product. We had to go through iteration after iteration to get it just right, creating repeatable processes along the way and getting our tooling and software ready to use to create a reliable and sturdy product that we could be proud of.

We made so many mistakes throughout the prototyping process, but every mistake was a valuable lesson, and thorough testing helped us ensure none of these mistakes would slip through and land in the final product.

We totally revamped our mobile app design, packaging, effects, website, and everything pertaining to our brand in the 18 months after our Kickstarter campaign. 

In November 2022, we excitedly began shipping to all of our North American Kickstarter backers. That following December, we received the next batch of Stratus® pedals off the manufacturing line, and finally began shipping to the rest of our international Kickstarter backers. We officially launched Stratus® on our website about a week before Christmas.

Fast forward to today, and our team, Robert, Armis, Eric, Kyla, and I, are rapidly improving Stratus®, rolling out new features, shipping out orders, and supporting existing Stratus® users. 

This is only the beginning.

ABOUT Fullyvital

Where Our Story Begins
And Your Hair’s Revival Takes Root.

Clinically informed, naturally inspired—our formulas help restore growth and preserve your hair’s natural vitality.

We believe hair wellness is deeply personal. Our mission is to support women through every stage of their hair journey—with effective, holistic solutions that work.

Born from Experience

FULLY VITAL was created out of a personal mission: to help women reclaim their confidence through healthier, fuller, more vibrant hair. When we saw how common premature graying, thinning, and shedding were—and how few natural, science-backed solutions existed—we set out to change that.

We believe women deserve options that are effective, clean, and rooted in both research and empathy.

Faraz Khan, Founder and Podcast Host

 

Passionate about anti-aging and host of the Anti-Aging Hacks Podcast, Faraz’s journey began with his own hair loss challenges, which he inherited from his mother. This desire to find natural solutions for his mom and himself led him to deeply research hair science.

His global exploration spanned Turkey, Korea, India, Thailand and USA. With a holistic focus on hair health, wellness, and anti-aging wisdom, Faraz and his scientific team developed safe and effective solutions for hair thinning in women and men.

 

The Founder

The Scientist

Sandra Kaufmann, Renowned Longevity Expert

With two Best-Selling Books on Extending Life and Slowing Aging, Sandra leverages her vast knowledge to explore the mechanisms behind hair graying and identify natural ingredients to help delay it. Her thorough scientific approach guarantees that FULLY VITAL products are not only cutting-edge but also highly effective.

 

Science Meets Strategy

When Faraz set out to create a holistic solution for gray hairs, he turned to Dr. Sandra Kaufman—renowned longevity expert and thought leader in age-related health to ensure every formula met the highest standard of safety and effectiveness.

Together, they developed a system that works in harmony with your body to preserve hair pigment and delay grays.

Our Journey

 

  • We've traveled the world searching for answers to hair thinning and graying.
  • We attended hair loss conferences and met with scientific researchers, hair transplant surgeons, regenerative medicine experts, device manufacturers, and holistic practitioners.
  • FULLY VITAL represents the culmination of years of research, passion, and dedication to creating products that truly work.
